case_title: MIGUEL A. SERRALTA CARDOS VS. KELLY'S MISSION ROCK, LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERRALTA CARDOS, MIGUEL A. AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY'S MISSION ROCK, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERRALTA CARDOS, MIGUEL A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLY'S MISSION ROCK, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $9,301.34 PRINCIPAL, $418.95 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,945.29, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
